Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2500 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Storm Warrior (K-Tel).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$34 sta $01 jsr $d000 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0a00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Storm Warrior (K-Tel).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $0A00 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Note: the contents of screen ram (starting at $0400) were modified at the point of taking the dump so that the game title is displayed correctly in the scroller area.
